data.title: Senator Moreno expects US CLARITY Act passed by April. Polymarket odds of enactment in 2026 surge to 90% post his positive remarks.
data.description: Chances of the US CLARITY Act being approved in 2026 surged to 90% on Polymarket yesterday following positive remarks from US Senator Bernie Moreno.
JPMorgan increases Celanese Corp target from $40 to $53.
JPMorgan trims Charles River Laboratories’ target from $190 to $165.

data.title: Crypto billionaire CZ praised CFTC Chair Selig's talk at Mar-a-Lago, stating he "learned a lot" at the World Liberty Forum.
data.description: Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao, also known as CZ, shared insights gained from CFTC Chair Michael Selig's presentation at the World Liberty Forum at Mar-a-Lago. The event was organized by World Liberty Financial, where CZ expressed his appreciation for the knowledge he acquired. Selig was part of a panel discussion on "Market Structure for the Digital Age" alongside NYSE President Lynn Martin. CZ's tweet about the event garnered attention, highlighting his interest in learning from industry leaders. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fed researchers find Kalshi's data valuable for real-time measuring of expectations during financial events, highlighting its rich intraday dynamics.
data.description: Kalshi's ability to measure expectations in real-time during significant financial events and announcements is attributed to its dynamic intraday data. Researchers have noted the platform's effectiveness in capturing fluctuations and trends with high precision and speed. This unique feature allows Kalshi to gauge market sentiments swiftly and accurately, providing valuable insights for investors and analysts.

data.title: Tamarack Resort offers 50% off lift tickets to Bogus Basin pass holders until Mar 13, 2026. Valid ID required.
data.description: In an update from Donnelly, Idaho on February 18th, 2026, Tamarack Resort revealed a new promotion. They declared that individuals holding the 2025/26 Bogus Basin season pass are eligible for a substantial discount of 50% on day lift tickets at Tamarack until March 13, 2026. This exclusive deal is now active and can be availed by showcasing a valid Bogus Basin pass at the ticket counter.
Susquehanna lifts Analog Devices target from $360 to $400.
LeonaBio sees Mizuho upgrade rating to Outperform and lift target price to $10 from $4.
JPMorgan raises MKS Incorporated (MKSI.O) target price to $305 from $265.
Indonesian government reports $38.4 billion in agreements with U.S. firms covering textiles, energy, agriculture, and tech.

data.title: Altcoin selling pressure peaks at five-year high as confidence declines, matching outflows of 2021.
data.description: Selling pressure in the altcoin market remains strong, as net outflows have reached levels comparable to those witnessed in 2021.

data.title: Over half (51.4%) of U.S. residential builders are operating unprofitably, as per the 2026 industry report.
data.description: In Houston on February 18, 2026, it was reported that over 50% of residential building firms in the United States are running at a loss when proper accounting practices are considered. This information comes from the recent 2026 State of Residential Construction Industry (SORCI) Report issued by the Association of Professional Builders.
5-year JGB yield increases by 1 bp, reaching 1.630%.
GFZ recorded a 5.47‑magnitude earthquake in southern Iran.

data.title: Elizabeth Warren cautions against potential crypto bailout benefiting Trump family business, amid uncertain US intervention in Bitcoin drop.
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren expressed uncertainty regarding whether the US government has intentions to intervene in the ongoing selloff of Bitcoin, a popular digital currency. Warren's comments suggest a lack of clarity on potential government actions amidst the recent price fluctuations in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Aptos plans to revamp tokenomics with 2.1B hard cap, staking reward cuts, and 10x gas fee rise to bolster APT deflation.
data.description: The Aptos Foundation is planning to introduce several changes, including setting a hard cap of 2.1 billion tokens. They also intend to implement reductions in short-term staking rewards and increase gas fees by 10 times.
Copper, lithium unlikely to match gold’s gains as output rises: Goldman-scmp
JPMorgan lowers Fiverr International rating from Overweight to Neutral, trimming target price to $15.

data.title: Singapore and Cambodia's Supreme Courts signed MOU on Feb. 10, 2026 to enhance judicial cooperation.
data.description: On February 10, 2026, the Supreme Courts of Singapore and Cambodia inked a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to enhance bilateral judicial collaboration. This event signifies a major step in strengthening relations between the two countries' court systems.
JPMorgan lifts Howmet Aerospace target from $227 to $265.
